info.title: Fenergo Nebula Policy Command
info.description: Policy Command API is part of FenX eco-system to manage Requirement Sets, Requirements, Data Groups and Data Group Fields Instances. All the operations require valid access token obtained from Identity service.

post.description:
• Creates a new data group with a first draft version.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: PolicyConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

post.description:
• Creates a new version of an existing data group.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: PolicyConfigurationEdit

parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

post.summary: Create data group version draft from different version
post.description:
• Creates a new draft version of an existing data group from another version.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version initializes with the data saved in selected version, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: PolicyConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: versionNumber
parameters.description: Version number to create a new draft from

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

messages.message: Not Found. Data group with given id does not exist

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

delete.description:
• Deletes the selected version of an existing data group.
  • If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as deleted and become unavailable.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: PolicyConfigurationDelete

post.description:
• Clones the selected version of an existing data group and creates a new model with a single version.
  • The new version contains all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.
  • Returns the id of the cloned data group version.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: PolicyConfigurationEdit

businessRelated.description: Collection of business related access layers

data.description: The service request DTO
The service response DTO

messages.description: List of Fenergo.Nebula.Platform.Core.Models.Response.ServiceResponseMessage associated to the service response

data.description: The service request DTO

BasicRuleDto.description: Request DTO representing basic validation rule metadata

BasicRuleDto2.description: Request DTO representing basic validation rule metadata

staticRule.description: Static validation rule always applied when active

operands.description: Collection of operands for given condition. These might contain additional, nested conditions of type Fenergo.Nebula.Platform.LogicEngine.Model.Dto.ConditionDefinitionDto

value.description: Request DTO representing basic validation rule metadata

priority.description: Priority of the value in case when multiple conditional values are evaluated

staticRule.description: Static validation rule always applied when active

CloneDataGroupVersionDto.description: Request DTO representing clone data group data
